creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 214079
changes MASTER_SITES && WWW

This port is currently marked BROKEN for lack
of working MASTER_SITES
The attached svn diff seeks to correct that.
There are 2 svn diffs attached to this pr(1).

1) changes MASTER_SITES && WWW to working alternatives
2) In case current maintainer is unavailable, or
uninterested in this port. Is the same as 1. But also
changes MAINTAINER

That's it. Thanks!

--Chris
